// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {



    static constexpr std::array<float, 4> keys = {
        1.3f, 3.5f, 6.8f, 9.0f
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const float key) noexcept {
        if ((key < 1.3f))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((key > 9.0f))
        {
         return false;
        }


        for (size_t i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            if (keys[i] == key)
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 4;
    static constexpr float min_key = 1.3f;
    static constexpr float max_key = 9.0f;
};
